overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a neon-lit futuristic city at night. The character traverses covered sidewalks under elevated highways, open streets with Japanese-themed signage, and urban plazas with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk under elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: pedestrian in yellow jacket crosses the street from right to left in front of the character
character steps onto the sidewalk and continues walking forward under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, passing yellow construction barriers and concrete pillars

notable_agents.action: crossing the street from right to left wearing a yellow high-visibility jacket

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure overhead with integrated linear lighting
red neon sign for 'Barley Illegal' establishment on the right side
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the left side of the sidewalk
massive cylindrical concrete support pillars for the elevated highway
red and yellow painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway overpass in a neon-lit cyberpunk city. A pedestrian crosses in front as the character walks forward along the covered sidewalk, passing construction barriers and concrete pillars while the 'Barley Illegal' neon sign glows on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with pawnshop and neon advertisements

events.description: passing by a pawnshop with illuminated blue and green signage on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the covered walkway, approaching and passing a pawnshop with bright neon signage while following a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the same direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: blue and green neon sign reading 'PAWNSHOP' on a small yellow building facade
linear fluorescent tube lights attached to the underside of the overpass providing illumination

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the elevated highway, the character passes a brightly lit pawnshop on the left with neon signage. The walkway remains covered and sheltered, with construction barriers now further back on the left as the character follows a pedestrian ahead through the neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with Japanese-themed signage and atmospheric steam vents

events.description: exits the covered overpass area into an open street with visible sky and different architecture
turquoise sports car drives past on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: turning slightly left onto an open street lined with red paper lanterns and steam vents, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: turquoise sports car driving along the street and passing by

entered.detail: purple neon sign with Japanese characters and 'TENGU' text mounted on a building
traditional red spherical paper lanterns hanging outside the building facade
ground vents emitting steam or smoke creating atmospheric haze along the sidewalk
black and yellow striped traffic bollards lining the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered overpass into an open street with visible sky above. Japanese-themed architecture appears on the left with a 'TENGU' neon sign and red paper lanterns, while steam rises from ground vents. A turquoise sports car drives past on the right as the character continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with massive digital billboards and advertisements

events.description: enters a wide open plaza area surrounded by towering buildings with massive digital screens
crosses through the open plaza space toward the far side where an elevated structure is visible

agents.ego_description: crossing through the open plaza area surrounded by towering digital advertisements and other pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the plaza in various directions

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying 'BATTLEFIELD' advertisement with military imagery and text
large digital billboard showing a face with 'DAVID MARTINEZ' text in bright colors
overhead pedestrian bridge or highway structure connecting buildings across the plaza
wide open concrete plaza space with painted markings and barriers

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban plaza surrounded by towering digital billboards including advertisements for 'BATTLEFIELD' and 'DAVID MARTINEZ'. The character crosses through the open space with other pedestrians, moving toward an elevated structure visible in the distance while the N54 News building becomes visible on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway leading toward illuminated arch

events.description: enters another covered section beneath an elevated highway structure with the N54 News building visible
approaching a brightly illuminated arch structure visible in the far distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk toward a distant illuminated archway, with the N54 News building visible to the left and elevated highway overhead

entered.detail: tall building with illuminated 'N54 NEWS' signage in blue and red neon lights
massive elevated highway or monorail structure overhead with support columns
large brightly lit archway structure glowing white in the far distance
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street level below

segments.scene_description: The character enters another covered walkway beneath an elevated highway structure, with the N54 News building prominent on the left. The sidewalk is bordered by a green metal railing on the right. Ahead, a large illuminated arch glows brightly in the distance as the character continues walking forward through the neon-lit corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk district, transitioning from sheltered underpasses into a wide urban plaza before returning to a covered corridor. It begins at a crosswalk beneath an elevated highway, moving past concrete pillars and a glowing Barley Illegal sign while following a pedestrian along a covered sidewalk. As the camera continues forward past a brightly lit pawnshop, the scene opens from the sheltered overpass into a street featuring Japanese-themed architecture, red lanterns, and rising steam, just as a turquoise sports car drives past. The environment then expands into a vast urban plaza dominated by towering digital billboards for Battlefield and David Martinez, with the N54 News building appearing on the left. Finally, the camera shifts back under another elevated structure, following a green metal railing toward a large, brightly illuminated arch glowing in the distance.
